Summary: Stripped CI pipeline to quality-gates-only: re-enabled ci.yml with all 5 required checks (lint, typecheck, tests, security audit, PII scan) on every push and PR. Removed deploy.yml and deploy.yml.disabled (Docker builds, ECR pushes, ECS deploys, production database migrations). Removed ci.yml.disabled. Security audit (npm audit --audit-level=high) and PII scan (SSN patterns, hardcoded secrets, email detection) were already wired up in the existing CI workflow.
